verses.1: Then you will say on that day, “I will give thanks to You, LORD; For although You were angry with me, Your anger is turned away, And You comfort me.
verses.2: “Behold, God is my salvation, I will trust and not be afraid; For the LORD GOD is my strength and song, And He has become my salvation.”
verses.3: Therefore you will joyously draw water From the springs of salvation.
verses.4: And on that day you will say, “Give thanks to the LORD, call on His name. Make known His deeds among the peoples; Make them remember that His name is exalted.”
verses.5: Praise the LORD in song, for He has done glorious things; Let this be known throughout the earth.
verses.6: Rejoice and shout for joy, you inhabitant of Zion, For great in your midst is the Holy One of Israel.
